title: rubus × divexiscandens
intro: Rubus × divexiscandens, also known as a hybrid blackberry or raspberry, is a cross between a blackberry and a raspberry plant, exhibiting characteristics of both species. The medicinal properties of Rubus × divexiscandens include its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. The herbal preparations of Rubus × divexiscandens include fresh or dried fruits, jams, jellies, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
